questions.question: 1 (a) Place the metre rule on the pivot, without the loads P and Q, and adjust its position so that the metre rule is as near as possible to being balanced. The rule must remain at this position on the pivot throughout the experiment. Place the load P on the metre rule so that the edge that is furthest from the pivot is exactly at the 10.0 cm mark on the rule.
